## Summary


## Checklist

- [ ] `Rscript scripts/check-local.R --dev` passes locally or the R CI check passes
- [ ] `python scripts/check-python.py --smoke --no-install` passes when Python code changes
- [ ] `python scripts/check-stata-package.py` passes when Stata files change
- [ ] User-facing changes are documented
- [ ] Relevant examples or tests were updated
- [ ] Generated local outputs are not included in the commit
